BugInstance.ShortMessage: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugInstance.LongMessage: SignupRequestMapper.passwordEncoder not initialized in constructor and dereferenced in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.SignupRequestMapper.setToEntityFields(User, SignupRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugInstance.LongMessage: SignupRequestMapper.roleService not initialized in constructor and dereferenced in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.SignupRequestMapper.setToEntityFields(User, SignupRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: Consider using Locale parameterized version of invoked method
BugInstance.LongMessage: Use of non-localized String.toUpperCase() or String.toLowerCase() in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.SignupRequestMapperImpl.toUser(SignupRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.TransactionRequestMapper.setWalletService(WalletService) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into TransactionRequestMapper.walletService

BugInstance.ShortMessage: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugInstance.LongMessage: TransactionRequestMapper.typeService not initialized in constructor and dereferenced in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.TransactionRequestMapper.setToEntityFields(Transaction, TransactionRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugInstance.LongMessage: TransactionRequestMapper.walletService not initialized in constructor and dereferenced in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.TransactionRequestMapper.setToEntityFields(Transaction, TransactionRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugInstance.LongMessage: WalletRequestMapper.userService not initialized in constructor and dereferenced in com.github.yildizmy.dto.mapper.WalletRequestMapper.setToEntityFields(Wallet, WalletRequest)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.github.yildizmy.security.UserDetailsImpl.getAuthorities() may expose internal representation by returning UserDetailsImpl.authorities

BugPattern.ShortDescription: Field not initialized in constructor but dereferenced without null check
BugPattern.Details:
This field is never initialized within any constructor, and is therefore could be null after the object is constructed. Elsewhere, it is loaded and dereferenced without a null check. This could be either an error or a questionable design, since it means a null pointer exception will be generated if that field is dereferenced before being initialized.

See CWE-457: Use of Uninitialized Variable.

BugPattern.ShortDescription: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugPattern.Details:
This code stores a reference to an externally mutable object into the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Storing a copy of the object is better approach in many situations.

See CWE-374: Passing Mutable Objects to an Untrusted Method.

BugPattern.ShortDescription: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugPattern.Details:
Returning a reference to a mutable object value stored in one of the object's fields exposes the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Returning a new copy of the object is better approach in many situations.

See CWE-374: Passing Mutable Objects to an Untrusted Method.

BugPattern.ShortDescription: Consider using Locale parameterized version of invoked method
BugPattern.Details:
A String is being converted to upper or lowercase, using the platform's default encoding. This may result in improper conversions when used with international characters. Use the

  • String.toUpperCase( Locale l )
  • String.toLowerCase( Locale l )

versions instead.
